heading: Flagship clients, cross-sector credibility
description: Since onset, we have serviced more than 1000 clients across the globe and maintained 100% success in executing projects across sectors including banks, hospitals, hotels, FMCG, pharma, media, automobile, aviation, insurance, e-commerce, retail, real estate, education, development, and government bodies.
flagship_clients: Coca Cola, Accenture, Baskin Robbins, HCL Technologies, Marks & Spencer, Tata Motors, Flipkart, Mankind Pharma, Bose Corporation, Mahindra, Saint-Gobain, Hitachi, IKEA, Save the Children, WaterAid, PVR Cinemas, Max Hospitals, and Brookfield PE.
